latin: Currum meum in spatium parvum dirigere conatus sum. primum nimis procul a margine eram. deinde nimis prope. post viginti conatus, homo a tergo cornu cecinit. tandem pedibus ambulavi.

questions.prompt: What is the narrator trying to do?
What does the narrator do in the end?

translation: I tried to steer my car into a small space. First I was too far from the curb. Then too close. After twenty attempts, a person behind me honked. Finally I walked on foot.
